turns.name: Discover DC scope
turns.user: Discover domain controllers in scope for this run and list which hosts are reachable now.

turns.name: Run baseline on AD0
turns.user: Start with AD0 if present, otherwise first discovered DC, and collect replication + reboot evidence with exact UTC markers.

turns.name: Continue all remaining DCs in same turn
turns.user: Now continue with all other discovered DCs in this same turn. Do not stop after AD0 and do not return partial output.

turns.name: Retry only failed non-AD0 targets once
turns.user: Retry only failed or unreachable non-AD0 targets once, then continue with available evidence and avoid rerunning successful hosts.

turns.name: Cross-DC evidence matrix
turns.user: Return a per-DC matrix: AD0 baseline vs each remaining DC, evidence present/missing, earliest UTC, latest UTC, confidence.

turns.name: Replication deltas focus
turns.user: Highlight replication deltas between AD0 and other DCs and flag which differences are likely transient vs persistent.

turns.name: Blocker handling
turns.user: For unreachable DCs, state exact blocker and fallback path, then continue with remaining scope.

turns.name: Likely root-cause classes
turns.user: Classify likely root-cause families with confidence and strongest evidence per family.

turns.name: Execute-now validation checklist
turns.user: Provide a prioritized 30-minute execute-now validation checklist with no follow-up questions.

turns.name: Final compact summary
turns.user: Summarize in 6 bullets with UTC markers, participating DC count, unresolved blockers, and rerun trigger.
